steps.title: Identify the structural setup
steps.content: The passage characterizes C. geaster as selective, then immediately uses a colon to signal what follows elaborates on that trait.

steps.title: Recognize the elaboration
steps.content:
The underlined portion says that C. geaster is "typically found on the decaying stumps and roots of only a few tree species that are abundant in these areas." This shows what the selectivity trait means in practice.

The other choices either misidentify this as explanation rather than elaboration, highlight non-existent impacts, or confuse selectivity with earlier uncertainty.

That is the correct answer.
